issues.description: Independent test verification failed for the third consecutive turn. evidence_bundle.independent_tests.tests_passed is false, and the output is non-functional: 'I'll run that pytest command for you and show you the full output.' instead of actual pytest results. Duration 8.66s suggests the command ran, but produced garbage output instead of test results.
issues.requirement: All ACs require independent test verification
issues.suggestion: This appears to be an orchestrator-level bug in the independent test harness, not a Player implementation issue. The test infrastructure needs debugging before approval can be granted. The Player cannot fix this - it requires orchestrator-level intervention.

issues.description: AC-008 (lint/format checks) is missing from orchestrator's independent verification. evidence_bundle.requirements.criteria_total shows 7, but original requirements specify 8 ACs (AC-001 through AC-008). The Player provides self-reported evidence of ruff checks passing, but there is no orchestrator verification of AC-008.
issues.requirement: AC-008: All modified files pass project-configured lint/format checks with zero errors
issues.suggestion: Add AC-008 to the orchestrator's automated verification suite, or manually verify that all implementation files pass `ruff check` and `ruff format --check` with zero errors.

issues.description: Honesty verification shows 11 files claimed as modified in turn 3, but git status shows none were actually changed this turn. Files: .claude/task-plans/TASK-MEM-004-implementation-plan.md, .env.example, deploy/local/docker-compose.yml, deploy/local/initdb/01_extensions.sql, src/fleet_memory/settings.py, tests/conftest.py, tests/integration/__init__.py, tests/integration/conftest.py, tests/integration/test_ephemeral_fixture.py, tests/unit/test_fake_embed_fixture.py, tests/unit/test_settings.py. Severity is 'should_fix', not critical.
issues.requirement: Accurate reporting of files_modified per turn
issues.suggestion: Only include files actually modified in the current turn in files_modified. If implementation was completed in previous turns, files_modified for turn 3 should be empty or contain only metadata/report files. The orchestrator notes this is a warning, not a turn-rejecting issue.

criteria_verification.notes: Orchestrator independently verified: deploy/local/docker-compose.yml exists with pgvector/pgvector:pg16 image, PGPORT env var for dynamic port binding (no fixed 5432), ./initdb mounted to /docker-entrypoint-initdb.d, pg_isready healthcheck with interval 2s and retries 10. Evidence references lines 3, 8, 10, 12, 14-18.

Orchestrator independently verified: deploy/local/initdb/01_extensions.sql exists with 'CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS vector;' on line 2. Script is mounted and executed automatically on container initialization.

Orchestrator independently verified: tests/integration/conftest.py lines 106-115 implement _is_docker_available() with 5-second timeout check. ephemeral_pg fixture calls pytest.skip() with descriptive message when Docker unavailable, ensuring fast-fail with no hang.

Orchestrator independently verified: ephemeral_pg fixture in tests/integration/conftest.py lines 95-180 yields postgresql://fleet_memory:fleet_memory@127.0.0.1:{port}/fleet_memory DSN with random port (_get_random_port() lines 30-40). Teardown via _teardown_compose() (lines 76-92) calls 'docker compose down -v --remove-orphans'. Cleanup registered via request.addfinalizer and atexit. Tests test_ephemeral_pg_starts_and_provides_dsn, test_ephemeral_pg_uses_random_port, test_teardown_removes_container_and_volume all passed.

Orchestrator independently verified: test_pgvector_extension_available passed, confirming 'SELECT extname FROM pg_extension WHERE extname = 'vector'' returns 'vector'. Init script executed successfully during container initialization.

Orchestrator independently verified: ephemeral_pg_factory fixture in tests/integration/conftest.py lines 183-273 creates independent instances with UUID-based project names. test_data_isolation_between_projects passed, confirming different ports and mutual data invisibility between instances.

Orchestrator independently verified: tests/conftest.py exports fake_embed fixture at line 18 returning Callable[[str], list[float]]. Implementation fully inline using hash-seeded LCG (lines 34-50), generates 768 dimensions, uses only stdlib imports (no fleet_memory imports). Unit tests confirm deterministic behavior and no I/O: test_fake_embed_produces_768_dim_vector, test_fake_embed_is_deterministic, test_fake_embed_different_inputs_differ, test_fake_embed_values_in_valid_range all passed in 0.04s.

NOT independently verified by orchestrator. evidence_bundle.requirements.criteria_total is 7, but original requirements specify 8 ACs. AC-008 is missing from criteria_results. Player provides self-reported evidence of ruff checks passing, but no orchestrator verification. Cannot verify without independent confirmation.

rationale: Cannot approve despite 7/7 orchestrator-checked criteria being verified and all quality gates passing. Three blocking issues: (1) Independent test verification failed (tests_passed: false) with garbage output for the third consecutive turn - this is the authoritative test signal per Coach instructions and appears to be an orchestrator infrastructure bug, not a Player issue; (2) AC-008 missing from orchestrator's independent verification - only 7 of 8 required ACs were checked; (3) Honesty discrepancies on 11 files (though marked 'should_fix', not critical). The independent test infrastructure needs debugging at the orchestrator level before approval can be granted. All implementation appears correct based on verified criteria, but independent verification infrastructure must be functional to approve.
